title: RIL-seq browser
author: Milan Gerovac
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Browser for RNA interaction by ligation and sequencing (RIL-seq, Melamed et al. 2018 Nat Protoc) datasets, for details see Matera et al. 2022 MolCell. All RNAs are displayed by Dash/Cytoscape.js in a network, individual RNA-RNA-chimeric reads are selectable and displayable as an annotation/read-view. The browser allows for isolation of RNAs of interest and setting of limitation connected to reads. Color coding of RNAs can be selected as feature-based of GO-term based. The required file format requires a NODES.csv file where all RNAs are listed with reads and GO-terms, an EDGES.csv file that lists all RNA-RNA connections with positions reads, and a ANNOTATION.csv file that contains the RNA annotations for display in the annotation/read-view. In addition, RIL-seq data can be uploaded for network generation and visualization.
